issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The text checks if the Leader has {Dressrosa} type, not if a card is on board.
Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'OnAttacked'. Text says 'On Your Opponent's Attack', which is the opponent attacking (OnAttack), not this card being attacked.
Missing 'Rest' action. Text requires resting this Stage as a cost before trashing and gaining power. Current DSL only has trash, missing the rest action.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' not 'EndOfBattle'. Text explicitly states 'during this battle' which occurs on opponent's turn and should use DuringOpponentTurn duration.
